segments.text: Normal money is just boring paper. But these three countries completely broke the rules. First, look at Australia.
Normal paper money tears and it gets ruined in the wash. So, Australia made plastic money. They put a clear window right in the middle. Now, the wash
cannot break it. Bad guys cannot copy it. This is smart. But look at this.
It's Switzerland. Normal money is printed sideways, but we put money in our wallets up and down. So, Switzerland flipped it. They made tall money. It's
much easier to hold and it looks like a beautiful painting. But still the best one is currency of Norway. Most money has boring pictures of old kings, but
Norway put pixel art on their money. It looks just like an old video game. As the money gets bigger, the pixels stretch out. They look like blowing
wind. True piece of art. Subscribe for more amazing designs.
